violations.text: Floor tiles on the sales floor area are in poor repair. Multiple ceiling tiles in the storage areas are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The door to the outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2023
